metadata.title: KORT.X — Global Software Studio
metadata.description: We are a global design and software studio. We build transformative digital experiences blending AI, design, and technology.
metadata.keywords: software studio, design, development, UX, branding, KORT.X

hero.headline: KORT.X is a global design and software studio
hero.sub: We build transformative digital experiences for leading brands by blending AI, design, and technology.

services.headline: Our services
services.sub: From first wireframe to production deploy. We deliver complete projects with clean code and design that works.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Sites, platforms and modern web applications with React, Next.js and Node.js. Performance, SEO and responsiveness are standard, not extras.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Apps for iOS and Android with React Native and Swift. User-centered design and integration with existing APIs.

systems.title: Systems & Automation
systems.description: Internal systems that replace spreadsheets and manual processes. ERPs, CRMs and custom-built tools.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.description: We integrate artificial intelligence into existing products or build AI-first solutions from scratch.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Interface design that makes sense. Research, prototypes and design systems to scale your product.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: We help you make technology decisions. Architecture, stack, scaling and migration.

whatWeBuild.headline: Services
whatWeBuild.sub: Strategy, design, technology and AI — combined to create digital experiences that transform businesses.

approach.headline: How we work
approach.sub: Straightforward process, no surprises. You follow every step.

1.title: Understand
1.description: We map the problem, the audience and the goals before writing a single line of code.

2.title: Design
2.description: Prototypes and wireframes validated with you before implementation.

3.title: Build
3.description: Short sprints with incremental deliveries. You test from day one.

4.title: Deliver
4.description: Deployment, monitoring and post-launch support included in every project.

1.question: What are KORT.X's core services?
1.answer: We offer web and mobile development, UI/UX design, custom systems, AI solutions and technical consulting. Every project is a custom solution — we don't use templates.

2.question: What sets KORT.X apart from other studios?
2.answer: We combine high-end design with solid engineering. Our team is 100% senior, we work with agile methodologies and deliver clean code with complete documentation. No juniors learning on your project.

3.question: Do you work with clients in different timezones?
3.answer: Yes. With offices in Orlando and Rio de Janeiro, we serve clients across the Americas and Europe with comfortable time overlap. We use async communication and collaborative tools.

4.question: How much does a project cost?
4.answer: Every project is unique. Corporate websites start at $5k, SaaS platforms from $20k, and enterprise projects on consultation. We do a free assessment before any proposal.

5.question: Do you work with startups?
5.answer: Yes, we work with startups at different stages — from MVP to scale-up. We understand product dynamics, rapid validation and iteration. We help build the right product from the start.

6.question: What's your tech stack?
6.answer: Our core stack includes React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL and AWS services. For AI, we work with OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain and open-source models.

about.headline: We transform companies through design and technology innovation
about.sub: A full-service studio designing and building inventive digital experiences across all platforms.

story.headline: Our story
story.p1: KORT.X was born from frustration with software that doesn't work. Late projects, bad code, generic design. We decided to do it differently.
story.p2: Our cross-disciplinary team combines strategy, branding, UX design and technology for swift, impactful results. Working as one team with our clients, we merge human creativity with AI-driven efficiency.

1.title: Code is craft
1.description: We write code like craftsmen. Every line has a purpose.

2.title: Design with intent
2.description: Every pixel exists for a reason. If it doesn't solve a problem, it doesn't ship.

3.title: Real delivery
3.description: We promise what we can deliver. We deliver what we promise.

4.title: Full transparency
4.description: You see everything: code, progress, decisions. No black boxes.

team.headline: Team
team.description: Lean, multidisciplinary, senior team. No juniors learning on your project. Based in Orlando and Rio de Janeiro.

contact.sub: Tell us about your project. We respond within 24 hours.

aiFirst.headline: AI-First Development
aiFirst.sub: We don't bolt on AI as a feature. We build with AI from day one.

what.headline: What does AI-First mean?
what.description: It means artificial intelligence isn't a module we add later. It's part of the architecture, the data flow and the user experience from the first commit.

1.title: Integrated LLMs
1.description: GPT-4, Claude and open-source models integrated directly into products.

2.title: Smart automation
2.description: Processes that adapt and improve with usage, no fixed rules.

3.title: Data as advantage
3.description: We turn raw data into actionable insights with ML pipelines.

4.title: Conversational UX
4.description: Interfaces that understand natural language, not just clicks.
